directions_tried.direction: Phase 0 canonical packet-object gate for the helical sign bottleneck
directions_tried.notes: Exploration 001 ended the strategy immediately with canonicity failure. The new `SD_part` / `SD_target` split did not fix packet support, representative quotient, desired-triad bookkeeping, or leakage instantiation.

explorations_completed.direction: Phase 0 canonical packet-object gate for the helical sign bottleneck
explorations_completed.key_takeaway: The two-functional sign split sharpens the hoped-for obstruction language but does not canonize the packet object. No preferred exact-NS packet/sign object survives harmless refinement or representative relabeling.
